tests.title: First Slack message → tenant provisioned → container started → message delivered
steps: Pre-seed allowlist entry for test user (team T_TC001, user U_TC001)
POST fake Slack event to relay /slack/events with valid HMAC signature
Verify relay returns HTTP 200 immediately (before provisioning completes)
Poll DB until tenant row exists with status=ACTIVE (max 30s)
Assert tenant directories created: home/, workspace/, config/, logs/, secrets/
Assert AGENTS.md seeded in workspace with '## Task Execution' section
Assert message_queue row transitions to DELIVERED
Assert Slack chat.postMessage called with agent response
Assert audit log contains TENANT_PROVISIONED, TENANT_STARTED, MESSAGE_DELIVERED in order
passFail: Full provisioning flow completes; message delivered; audit trail present

required: Full provisioning flow completes; message delivered; audit trail present

tests.title: Repeated messages from same user → same tenant reused
steps: Send second Slack event with same team+user, different event_id
Assert no new tenant row created (count = 1 for this principal)
Assert same tenant_id used for both messages
Assert second message_queue row added and delivered
passFail: Same tenant reused; message count incremented; no duplicate provisioning

required: Same tenant reused; message count incremented; no duplicate provisioning

tests.title: Stopped tenant → wakes on next message → queued messages replayed
steps: Provision a tenant and bring to ACTIVE
Send a Slack event to the relay for this tenant
Mock health endpoint returns healthy after start
Assert queued message_queue rows are delivered in order
passFail: Tenant wakes; queued messages replayed in FIFO order

required: Tenant wakes; queued messages replayed in FIFO order

tests.title: Concurrent messages to stopped tenant → single start (startup lock)
steps: Provision a tenant and set status=STOPPED
Assert only ONE call to dockerStart / dockerRun (mock call count)
Assert both messages are eventually delivered
Assert startup_locks table has at most 1 row at any time
Assert no duplicate containers (docker run called exactly once)
passFail: Startup lock prevents duplicate container starts

required: Startup lock prevents duplicate container starts

tests.title: Different users → completely isolated (no shared workspace/state)
steps: Provision tenant A (team T1, user U1) via POST /v1/tenants/provision
Provision tenant B (team T1, user U2) via POST /v1/tenants/provision
Assert different tenant IDs (sha256 of different principals)
Write a marker file to tenant A workspace
Assert marker file NOT present in tenant B workspace path
passFail: Complete filesystem and identity isolation between tenants

required: Complete filesystem and identity isolation between tenants

tests.title: Allowlist enforcement → unauthorized user rejected
steps: Ensure no allowlist entry exists for team T_BLOCKED, user U_BLOCKED
POST Slack event from T_BLOCKED/U_BLOCKED to relay
Assert NO tenant row created for this user
Assert Slack chat.postMessage called with invite-only rejection message
Assert ACCESS_DENIED audit log entry exists
passFail: Access denied; rejection DM sent; no tenant created

required: Access denied; rejection DM sent; no tenant created

tests.title: Tenant deletion → data cleaned up
steps: Provision tenant and create workspace files
Assert tenant row has deleted_at set (soft delete)
Assert message_queue rows for tenant purged
Assert tenant data_dir moved to tenants-archive/
passFail: All tenant resources cleaned up; audit trail preserved

required: All tenant resources cleaned up; audit trail preserved

tests.title: Health polling → UNHEALTHY detection
steps: Mock health endpoint to return 503 for 3 consecutive polls
Assert tenant status transitions to UNHEALTHY
Assert TENANT_UNHEALTHY audit log entry written with reason
Assert UNHEALTHY state does not affect other tenants
passFail: Health polling detects failure; UNHEALTHY state set

required: Health polling detects failure; UNHEALTHY state set

tests.title: Disk quota → warning at 90%, block at 100%
steps: Mock du -sb to return 10.8 GB (90% of 12 GB quota)
Assert Slack DM sent with cleanup suggestion
Mock du -sb to return 12 GB (100% of quota)
Assert POST /v1/tenants/:id/message returns 507 while quota exceeded
Run disk check; assert disk_quota_exceeded reset to 0
passFail: Warning at 90%, block at 100%, auto-clear below 95%

required: Warning at 90%, block at 100%, auto-clear below 95%

tests.title: Idle stop → container stopped after 48h inactivity
steps: Create tenant with status=ACTIVE and last_activity_at = now - 49 hours
Assert TENANT_STOPPED audit event with actor=scheduler
Create another tenant with last_activity_at = now - 47 hours
Assert second tenant is NOT stopped
passFail: Idle tenants stopped after 48h; recent tenants unaffected

required: Idle tenants stopped after 48h; recent tenants unaffected

tests.title: auth-profiles.json bind-mount → included in docker run options
steps: Call buildDockerRunOptions with tenantId, image, dataDir
Assert bind mount contains path ending in auth-profiles.json
Assert bind mount is marked read-only (:ro)
Assert container env includes HOME, XDG_CONFIG_HOME, XDG_CACHE_HOME, XDG_STATE_HOME
passFail: docker run options include auth-profiles.json:ro and correct env vars

required: docker run options include auth-profiles.json:ro and correct env vars

tests.title: AGENTS.md pre-seeded correctly in tenant workspace
steps: Assert AGENTS.md created with '## Task Execution' section
Call seedWorkspace again (AGENTS.md already present with section)
Remove '## Task Execution' section from AGENTS.md
Assert '## Task Execution' section appended to existing file
passFail: Three merge scenarios handled correctly

tests.title: Startup lock → no duplicate containers on concurrent messages
steps: Call acquireStartupLock → assert stale lock overridden, {acquired: true}
passFail: At most one lock holder; stale locks expire and can be taken over

required: At most one lock holder; stale locks expire and can be taken over

tests.title: Provisioning rollback → cleanup on failure
steps: Mock docker.run to throw an error
Call POST /v1/tenants/provision for a new user
Assert data_dir directory does NOT exist (cleaned up)
Retry twice more → assert status = FAILED permanently (attempts >= 3)
passFail: Rollback cleans up all resources; 3-attempt cap enforced

required: Rollback cleans up all resources; 3-attempt cap enforced

tests.title: Audit log → events recorded for all system actions
steps: Provision a tenant → assert TENANT_PROVISIONED event
Start the tenant → assert TENANT_STARTED event
Deliver a message → assert MESSAGE_DELIVERED event
Stop the tenant → assert TENANT_STOPPED event
Delete the tenant → assert TENANT_DELETED event
Attempt access by blocked user → assert ACCESS_DENIED event
Add allowlist entry → assert ACCESS_GRANTED event
Revoke allowlist entry → assert ACCESS_REVOKED event
GET /v1/admin/audit?tenant_id=X → assert all events returned in desc order
Assert audit log rows cannot be deleted or updated (no DELETE/UPDATE endpoint)
passFail: All 8 event types recorded; audit API returns them correctly

required: All 8 event types recorded; audit API returns them correctly

tests.title: Control plane startup reconciliation → crashed state reset
steps: Insert a tenant row with status=PROVISIONING into DB
Insert a tenant row with status=STARTING
Insert an expired startup_lock (expires_at in the past)
Insert a message_queue row with status=PROCESSING and updated_at = 3 minutes ago
Start/build the control plane app (calls reconciliation)
Assert SYSTEM_STARTUP audit log entry written
passFail: Startup reconciliation restores consistent state

tests.title: Config validation → missing env var causes fast failure
steps: Assert ZodError thrown with message identifying missing field
passFail: Fast failure with descriptive error on startup

required: Fast failure with descriptive error on startup

tests.title: Tenant ID computation → sha256(team:user).slice(0,16)
steps: Assert result is exactly 16 hex chars
Assert same inputs always produce same output (deterministic)
Assert different users produce different IDs
passFail: Deterministic, collision-resistant 16-char hex ID

tests.title: Slack signature verification → valid/invalid/expired
steps: POST /slack/events with valid HMAC signature → assert HTTP 200
POST /slack/events with invalid signature → assert HTTP 403
POST /slack/events with timestamp 6 minutes old → assert HTTP 403 (replay protection)
POST /slack/events with missing X-Slack-Signature → assert HTTP 403
POST /slack/events with type=url_verification → assert {challenge: ...} returned synchronously
passFail: Signature enforcement prevents unauthorized event injection

required: Signature enforcement prevents unauthorized event injection

tests.title: Interim message sent at 15s when agent takes too long
steps: Mock tenant runtime to delay response by 20 seconds
Assert chat.postMessage called with '⏳ Working on it...' after ~15s
Assert interim message sent only once
After mock response arrives at 20s, assert final response also posted to Slack
passFail: Interim 'working on it' message sent on 15s timer

required: Interim 'working on it' message sent on 15s timer

tests.title: Start endpoint → STOPPED → STARTING → ACTIVE transition
steps: Create tenant with status=STOPPED via DB
passFail: Full STOPPED → STARTING → ACTIVE state machine

required: Full STOPPED → STARTING → ACTIVE state machine

tests.title: Stop endpoint → ACTIVE → STOPPED transition
steps: Assert dockerStop called only once (not on second call)
passFail: Idempotent stop; correct DB transitions

tests.title: Container image promote → new default used on next start
steps: Insert new image row (tag: v2.0, is_default=0)
Assert v1.0 is_default=0 and deprecated_at set
Start a tenant → assert image_tag = v2.0 on tenant row
passFail: Image promotion works; tenants use new default on restart

required: Image promotion works; tenants use new default on restart

tests.title: Message queue deduplication → Slack retry is no-op
steps: Send identical Slack event again with same event_id (simulated Slack retry)
Assert only one delivery attempt made to tenant runtime
passFail: Duplicate Slack events idempotently ignored

tests.title: Allowlist revocation → existing tenant blocked
steps: Provision and activate tenant for user U_REVOKE
passFail: Revoked users cannot deliver messages to their tenant

required: Revoked users cannot deliver messages to their tenant

tests.title: UNHEALTHY auto-recovery → tenant recovers and queued messages processed
steps: Queue 2 messages while tenant is UNHEALTHY
Trigger UNHEALTHY detection (3 consecutive health poll failures)
Assert Slack DM sent about recovery attempt
Mock health endpoint to return healthy after 30s cooldown
Assert tenant returns to ACTIVE within 90s
Assert queued messages processed after recovery
passFail: Auto-recovery completes; queued messages not dropped

required: Auto-recovery completes; queued messages not dropped

tests.title: Provision endpoint idempotency → same tenant on duplicate call
steps: POST /v1/tenants/provision for (T1, U1) → assert tenant created
Assert only 1 tenant row in DB for this principal
Assert no new audit events written on idempotent call
passFail: Idempotent provisioning returns same tenant

tests.title: Queue reaping → DELIVERED rows older than 7 days deleted
steps: Insert DELIVERED message_queue row with created_at = 8 days ago
Insert DELIVERED message_queue row with created_at = 3 days ago
Insert FAILED message_queue row with created_at = 31 days ago
Insert FAILED message_queue row with created_at = 15 days ago
passFail: Correct retention policy applied

tests.title: Message forwarding → relay token mismatch → 401
steps: Provision and activate tenant with known relay_token
passFail: Relay token validates message delivery authorization

required: Relay token validates message delivery authorization

tests.title: Message forwarding → disk quota exceeded → 507
steps: Assert HTTP 507 {ok: false, error: 'Disk quota exceeded'}
passFail: Disk quota flag blocks message delivery

required: Disk quota flag blocks message delivery

tests.title: systemd unit files exist for all three services
passFail: All unit files present and correctly structured

required: All unit files present and correctly structured

tests.title: tenant-shell script validates container is running
steps: Assert file contains docker exec -it --user agent
passFail: Operator tool exists and is properly structured

required: Operator tool exists and is properly structured

tests.title: Tenant Dockerfile does not embed ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
steps: Assert no ENV instruction sets any API key
Assert auth-profiles.json is NOT COPY'd into the image
Assert image build ARG only has IMAGE_TAG (no auth args)
passFail: No credentials embedded in image

tests.title: Docker client wrapper → correct CLI flags constructed
steps: Assert :ro suffix on auth-profiles.json bind mount
passFail: CLI arguments constructed correctly for all operations

required: CLI arguments constructed correctly for all operations

tests.title: Workspace template fixtures → test-utils package
steps: Assert all required Tenant fields populated
Assert all required MessageQueueRow fields populated
Assert all DB methods are vi.fn() mocks
Assert run, start, stop, rm are vi.fn() mocks
passFail: Test utilities produce valid typed fixtures

required: Test utilities produce valid typed fixtures

tests.title: Health endpoint in tenant container returns correct JSON shape
steps: Verify healthy response shape: {ok: true, status: 'healthy', checks: {openclaw, workspace_mounted, home_mounted}, uptime_ms}
Verify unhealthy response shape: {ok: false, status: 'starting', checks: {...}}
passFail: Health server returns correct JSON shapes

required: Health server returns correct JSON shapes

tests.title: Message endpoint in tenant container validates relay token
steps: Verify file validates X-Relay-Token against RELAY_TOKEN env var
Assert response shape: {ok: true, response: '...', blocks: null} on success
Assert error response shape: {ok: false, error: '...'} on failure
passFail: Message server enforces relay token authentication

required: Message server enforces relay token authentication
